name: Honey, How Come the Rice Looks as Though It's Got Dirt ..
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized oven baking dish, combine the rice, beef consomme, French onion soup, and sliced mushrooms.
2. Stir all ingredients together until well mixed.
3. Sprinkle the butter bits on top of the mixture.
4. Cover the dish and bake at 350°F for 60 minutes. Do not peek.
